最后，作者加油💪"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669435572,"group_id":"7160929839426309153","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1887226266400184"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7160929839426309153","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"610103"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2568,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6356,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7170169984050938628","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爱了爱了，天胡开局，喜欢，无敌爽文
希望作者继续保持下去，初期发展，中后期平推，
希望不要水文，主角那么多文臣猛将，和关羽打的有来有回，在和吕布打的有来有回，希望不要这样写，直接平推他们。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669435400,"group_id":"7160929839426309153","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4H8hOymWiHkOyV682xG7BBQ2CEMEqh+H07iuCzXqdvI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1887226266400184","user_name":"古风城的豆豆兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1887226266400184","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7160929839426309153","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+系统+召唤+空间+历史武将+争霸天下】
刘轩从现世穿越来到三国时期。
正所谓身为穿越者，得为咱们华夏几千年历史，做点贡献。
必须把蛮夷，外族，给灭光，让历史上不再有五胡乱华的时间发生。
任你，蛮夷小国在兵强马壮，只看李元霸一锤破之。
任你，武将如云，谋士如雨，皆为我所败。
这里有，武圣岳飞，李存孝，西府赵王李元霸，血战小商桥的杨再兴，一统江山的刘伯温，历史上赫赫有名的武将与谋士，都来到三国这个，人才辈出的时代，在三国这个大舞台，展现出属于自己的风采！
袁绍：我有上将，颜良，文丑。
你可闭嘴吧，我家小孩，岳云，都能给你全捶死！
董卓：我有吾儿，吕布。
你也闭嘴！我家傻子，几锤也就把吕布拿下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e324f1bf5dcb2c9ee04ce6933a01ed39","author":"亿笑红尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7160929839426309153","book_name":"三国穿越三国获得S级辅助系统","book_short_name":"霸王一统三国","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7160938024908358184","read_count":"13648","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1031643"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"516","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,空间,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/433f7df1bc06c6f24acb1e4705cb9dfa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444135&x-signature=RgSEmaKJszhDx77maVt5CK%2Bao0M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2568062538089422","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"610103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231802152C6BE0B2E7E4257A5970"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读53分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":50,"forwarded_count":0,"
